## No-go wall-vs-witness flags

- `D0-ALPHA-PRESENT-CORE-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **WALL** — proved: every admissible present-core tower (growth a<=2) is trace-class
- `D0-CKM-OVERLAP-UNDERDETERMINATION-NOGO-001`: **WITNESS-PAIR (hiding-place risk)** — proved: two admissible basis completions give distinct |V12|^2
- `D0-CMB-CANONICAL-SMOOTHING-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **UNCLASSIFIED** — proved: tilt non-constant across the admissible-smoothing family
- `D0-HIGGS-CONDENSATION-PRESENT-CORE-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **WALL** — proved: every present-core projector commutes with T (incl. Riesz spectral projectors)
- `D0-INDUCTIVE-SPECTRAL-TRIPLE-OWNER-001`: **UNCLASSIFIED** — proved: algebra embeds but only downward Hilbert projections exist
- `D0-LEPTON-PUISEUX-UNIQUENESS-OBSTRUCTION-001`: **WITNESS-PAIR (hiding-place risk)** — proved: two companions share charpoly x^4-lam (index many-to-one)
- `D0-PHASON-MAGNITUDE-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **WITNESS-PAIR (hiding-place risk)** — proved: two admissible magnitude maps agree on sign+anchor but differ
- `D0-TORAL-SEED-MARKOV-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **UNCLASSIFIED** — proved: distinct-rectangle admissible adjacencies share Perron phi
- `D0-VNEXT2-DIRAC-COVARIANCE-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **UNCLASSIFIED** — proved: the covariance system is refinement-dependent; no unique scale cocycle.
- `D0-VNEXT2-SCENE-NATIVE-REFINEMENT-NOGO-001`: **WITNESS-PAIR (hiding-place risk)** — proved: >=2 admissible families (all-walks, non-backtracking, directed-edge) give inequivalent carriers
- `D0-VNEXT2-XI-MAXIMALITY-NOGO-001`: **UNCLASSIFIED** — proved: Xi = endpoint conditional expectation is family/measure-dependent; no canonical coisometry.
